# ADR-001: Use Terraform Plugin Framework for All New Resources

## Status

Accepted

## Date

2026-02-01 (retroactive documentation)

## Context

The exact shape that stopped the corpus capture — terraform-provider-proxmox's
real dialect: a `## Status` heading with `Accepted`, then a `## Date` section.
Eight of its eight ADRs are this shape and every one read as not-accepted before
this primitive existed.

## Decision

Resolve to accepted from the heading source.
